dual_model_update: DUAL MODEL TRANSFORMATION (iter 17, 2026-04-10): Transformed all artifacts to dual model format: (1) Added 'derived_from' to all entities/behaviors/rules. (2) Split entities: observed_fields (raw) + normalized_interpretation (redesign). (3) Split behaviors: observed_implementation (current) + normalized_interpretation (proposed). (4) Added structured 'rethink' sections with problem/observed/proposal/confidence. (5) All concepts bind to Layer 0 source (no pure abstraction). Example: EmailMessage entity has 21 observed fields (including retry states) + normalized interpretation (5 core states). This enables green-ai to design from concept WITHOUT inheriting legacy debt.
